ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the region the department is located in */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the department head */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "required_education_level" INTEGER /* Minimum education level required for the job role */,
  "required_experience_years" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the job role */,
  "job_role_status" TEXT /* Status of the job role (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "job_role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_fields" (
  "education_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education field */,
  "education_field_name" TEXT /* Name of the education field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education field */,
  "average_salary" INTEGER /* Average salary for employees in this field */,
  "field_status" TEXT /* Status of the education field (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_options" (
  "travel_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel option */,
  "travel_option_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel option (e.g., Non-Travel, Travel_Rarely, Travel_Frequently) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel option */,
  "travel_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of travel (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "travel_budget" INTEGER /* Annual travel budget for employees in this option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_ratings" (
  "performance_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance rating */,
  "performance_rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance rating (1-4 scale) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance rating */,
  "performance_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the performance rating */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satisfaction_levels" (
  "satisfaction_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satisfaction level */,
  "satisfaction_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the satisfaction level (1-5 scale) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the satisfaction level */,
  "satisfaction_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the satisfaction level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the satisfaction level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_involvement_levels" (
  "job_involvement_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job involvement level */,
  "job_involvement_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the job involvement level (1-4 scale) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job involvement level */,
  "involvement_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the job involvement level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job involvement level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_involvement_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_option_levels" (
  "stock_option_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock option level */,
  "stock_option_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock option level (0-3 scale) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock option level */,
  "option_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the stock option level */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stock option level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_option_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_skills" (
  "communication_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication skill level */,
  "communication_skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the communication skill level (1-5 scale) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the communication skill level */,
  "skill_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the communication skill level */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the communication skill level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behaviour_scores" (
  "behaviour_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior score */,
  "behaviour_score_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior score (1-5 scale) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior score */,
  "score_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for the behavior score */,
  "score_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the behavior score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behaviour_score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attrition" (
  "attrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attrition event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who left the company */,
  "attrition_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company */,
  "reason_for_attrition" TEXT /* Reason for the employee leaving the company */,
  "last_performance_rating" INTEGER /* Last performance rating of the employee before leaving */,
  "termination_type" TEXT /* Type of termination (e.g., Voluntary, Involuntary) */,
  "last_salary" INTEGER /* Last salary before leaving */,
  "last_benefits" TEXT /* Last benefits package before leaving */,
  "exit_interview_conducted" TEXT /* Whether an exit interview was conducted (Yes/No) */,
  "exit_interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the exit interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attrition_id")
)
